name: Fruit Punch 1
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pitcher, combine the tropical punch powder with water and stir well.
2. Add the orange juice concentrate to the mixture and stir thoroughly.
3. When ready to serve, pour the mixture into a punch bowl and add the white soda.
4. Yield: 20 servings (5 quarts).
Diabetic Exchanges: One serving equals 1/2 fruit; also, 38 calories, 3 mg sodium, 0 cholesterol, 9 gm carbohydrate, trace protein, trace fat.
